landing.step1Desc: Add the server and API token; it's stored encrypted on the server.
landing.step2Desc: Pull your forms and decide who can view, edit or validate each one.
landing.step3Desc: They view, edit and approve/reject, with their own review flow.
landing.tagline: Manage your KoboToolbox data and give your team access
landing.subtitle: KoboManager is the middle layer that lets your team view, edit and validate submissions — without a Kobo account and without exposing your API token.
landing.feat1Desc: Your team signs in with app users; they don't need a KoboToolbox account.
landing.feat2Desc: Approve or reject submissions; the status syncs both ways with Kobo's native validation.
landing.feat3Desc: The Kobo token is stored encrypted on the server and never exposed to the browser.
landing.footer: KoboManager v{version} — a management layer for KoboToolbox
landing.feat4Desc: Decide which submissions each user sees —by a field value or by who submitted them—, not just which forms.
landing.moreSubtitle: Built for teams that need to share and analyze data without giving up control and security.
landing.feat5Desc: Share a form by link, no account required: optionally with a password, an expiry date and the same row- and column-level scope you apply to your team —even narrowed to approved-only or to specific teams.
landing.featStatsDesc: Measure field performance by team and, within each team, by enumerator: volume, quality (review status), duration and completeness. It respects scoping, so a team lead only sees their own team.
landing.featColumnsDesc: Hide sensitive fields per user or mark them read-only, column by column. What's hidden never appears in the table, detail, statistics, search or export.
landing.selfHostTitle: It's free software: run your own instance
landing.selfHostBody: KoboManager is open source (AGPL-3.0). Deploy it on your own server at no cost, or support the project to keep it growing.
landing.disclaimer: KoboManager is an independent open-source project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by KoboToolbox or Rakuten Kobo.
